### Describe the Proposed Feature
Is your feature request related to a specific operational problem? Please describe clearly.

### Technical Concept & Proposed Flow
Provide an initial outline of the architectural implementation of the feature.

### Mockups or Flowcharts (Optional)
Link or paste diagrams here (e.g. Mermaid flows).
